agents.role: Executes governance workflows: reconciliation, AOS submission, verification
agents.output_contract: Produces ActivityResults and publishes to NATS. All outputs are drafts.
agents.approval_boundary: May execute M1-M3 tools. M5 tools require explicit human authorization.

agents.role: Applies ordivon-core-method skill to audit claims, frame execution, classify debt, draft receipts
agents.input_contract: Accepts text with claims, task descriptions, AI output, or failure reports
agents.output_contract: Produces claim audits (P1), execution frames (P2), governance audits (P3), debt classifications (P4), receipt drafts (P5). All outputs carry draft: true.
agents.approval_boundary: May propose, classify, draft. May NOT authorize, close debt, suppress risk, self-upgrade status.

agents.role: Reviews AI-generated outputs for overclaim, false completion, and boundary violations
agents.input_contract: Accepts AI-generated text, receipts, or agent outputs
agents.output_contract: Produces P3 governance audit findings. Advisory only — does not block.
agents.approval_boundary: Read-only. May flag issues, never modify source.

agents.role: Tests governance boundaries: attempts overclaim, false completion, self-closure to verify checkers catch violations
agents.output_contract: Produces red-team findings and eval scores
agents.approval_boundary: May simulate violations in sandbox. May NOT affect production ledgers.

delegate_task.accountability: Delegating agent remains responsible. Subagent output is NOT verified output.
delegate_task.context_isolation: Subagent has no memory of parent conversation. All context must be explicit.
delegate_task.self_report_rule: Subagent summaries are SELF-REPORTS, not verified facts. Verify independently.
